creator: erwan@netvalue.com
text:
Also, i think it would be nice to have the patches to
/etc/defaults/rc.conf and rc.network located at
http://www.swcp.com/~synk/ipfmerge.patch integrated into the base
system, if they fit ...
-- 
UNIX *IS* user friendly.  It's just selective about who its friends are.
                                                               --unknown
